title: Privilege Escalation Attempt Detected
description: Detects privilege escalation attempts including SUID abuse, sudo misuse and kernel exploit indicators.
author: SOC Team
aql: LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (payload ILIKE '%base64%' OR payload ILIKE '%/dev/tcp%' OR payload ILIKE '%mkfifo%' OR payload ILIKE '%0>&1%')
